output: {"id":"d8ed6756b4a941d342f7371453fefba0","text":"The airplane Buddy Holly died in was the \"American Pie.\" (Thus the name of the Don McLean song.)","source":"djtech.net","source_url":"http://www.djtech.net/humor/useless_facts.htm","language":"en","permalink":"https://uselessfacts.jsph.pl/api/v2/facts/d8ed6756b4a941d342f7371453fefba0"}
